title: QA verification for CMMC Shield MVP
description: Run full QA verification against the MVP spec and mission requirements. Verify: (1) all 110 controls are represented in the assessment, (2) SSP generation produces valid document output, (3) POA&M creation works for gap scenarios, (4) readiness scoring is mathematically sound, (5) auth flow and Stripe checkout work end-to-end, (6) dashboard renders correctly, (7) responsive design is functional. Output: products/product-0603/qa/qa_report.json with PASS/FAIL/PASS_WITH_NOTES result.
